sections.instruction: Choose the correct letter A, B or C for Questions 31-34. Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORD ONLY for Questions 35-40.

questions.content: According to the speaker, how might a guest feel when staying in a luxury hotel?

B It has a very limited effect
C It has no effect whatsoever
